item.name: Authentic Curry Plate
item.description:
An authentically prepared plate of the Hingan twist on traditional Hannish curry, tailored to the Far Eastern palate.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
Direct Hit Bonus: +4% (Max 12)
VIT Bonus: +4% (Max 8)
Gear Durability Bonus: +2
EXP Bonus: +3%
Duration: 30m
(Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
